label: Amazon — E-Commerce Browser
description: Extracted from: generic e-commerce Playwright scrapers, Amazon scraper patterns, Scrapfly Amazon guides. Verified 2026-07-16: search works via CDP, physical product pages block automated access (Page Not Found). Book pages render fully.
source_patterns: Search: type query → 3-5s results → scroll results 1-2s per product row (confirmed: search works, 64+ results, no captcha)
Product page: scroll for description (lazy-loads!) → click 'See More' → 1-2s → scroll to reviews
⚠️ Amazon blocks physical product pages for CDP-driven sessions (returns Page Not Found, 770px). Book (Kindle) pages work — description NOT lazy-loaded, in initial HTML.
Add to cart: click → 1-2s → cart modal → 'Proceed' or continue
Image gallery: click thumbnail → 500ms switch → hold on main image 2-4s
Navigation: deliberate, goal-oriented. Not casual browsing.

scroll.description: Targeted — scroll to find specific info (price, desc, reviews). Source: e-com scrapers

lazy_load_strategy.description: Product descriptions and A+ content are lazy-loaded. Scroll past fold.

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate homepage → search → scroll results → click product → scroll past fold (description lazy-loads) → click 'See More' → scroll to reviews → click review page → back → add to cart
